chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-1376 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For hearing of M.A No.10497/2025 (Return of surety) 29.12.2025 Mr.Imtiaz Ali Channa, Advocate for the applicant/surety Mr.Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G ********* Through listed application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. Learned counsel for the applicant/surety states that vide Order dated 20.12.2024, the applicant/accused Ashfaque Ahmed son of Ghulam Rasool was granted ad-interim pre-arrest bail by this Court and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. He further stated that on 21.12.2024, the applicant/accused appeared before the trial Court, such case diary submitted by him under the cover of statement, which is taken on record. He submits that vide Order dated 20.01.2025, the bail was dismissed and interim bail earlier granted to the applicant/accused was recalled, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. Learned D.P.G after going through the record, tendered his no objection for release of surety. In view of above, listed application stands disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
